“Hey, people, I've been making art for my whole entire adult life. I went to art
school, and the thing I noticed was even though I went to went to art school and
it seemed like I was set up for success is that one day, I walk in the studio and I'm
a rockstar. And the next day, I can barely hold a paintbrush. And then, the next
day, I'm back to being awesome, and then, a week later, I just can't make
anything.
“And I've noticed that artists have this problem. It's not just me, and I've been
struggling with it for 20 years. And over those 20 years, I took notes every step of
the way, and I started to figure it out. And I figured out how to make art
consistently, how to be consistent in my art, how to make great art pretty much
every time I walk in the studio.
